Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.Configuration

Packages that use Configuration 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope

  • Uses of Configuration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  Requirements
    Verifies API requirements using a custom configuration.

    Requirements Requirements.withConfiguration​(Configuration newConfig)  

  • Uses of Configuration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

    Subinterfaces of Configuration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  GuavaRequirements
    Verifies the requirements types from of the Guava library API.
    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava that implement Configuration 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  DefaultGuavaRequirements
    Default implementation of GuavaRequirements.
    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava with parameters of type Configuration 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    GuavaRequirements GuavaRequirements.withConfiguration​(Configuration configuration)  

  • Uses of Configuration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of Configuration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  JavaRequirements
    Verifies the requirements of types from the Java core API.
    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that implement Configuration 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  DefaultJavaRequirements
    Default implementation of JavaRequirements.
    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return Configuration 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    Configuration Configuration.putContext​(String name, Object value)
    Adds or updates contextual information associated with the exception message.
    Configuration Configuration.removeContext​(String name)
    Removes contextual information associated with the exception message.
    Configuration Configuration.withAssertionsDisabled()
    Indicates that assertThat() shouldn't do anything.
    Configuration Configuration.withAssertionsEnabled()
    Indicates that assertThat() should invoke requireThat().
    Configuration Configuration.withCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack traces should omit references to this library.
    Configuration Configuration.withConfiguration​(Configuration configuration)
    Replaces a verifier's configuration.
    Configuration Configuration.withDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    Configuration Configuration.withoutCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack traces should contain references to this library.
    Configuration Configuration.withoutDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should not show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    <T> Configuration Configuration.withoutStringConverter​(Class<T> type)
    Indicates that an object's toString() method should be used to convert it to a String.
    <T> Configuration Configuration.withStringConverter​(Class<T> type, Function<T,​String> converter)
    Indicates that a function should be used to convert an object to a String.
    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java with parameters of type Configuration 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    Configuration Configuration.withConfiguration​(Configuration configuration)
    Replaces a verifier's configuration.
    JavaRequirements JavaRequirements.withConfiguration​(Configuration configuration)  

  • Uses of Configuration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Constructors in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal with parameters of type Configuration 
    Constructor Description
    ArrayValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, A actual, Collection<E> actualAsCollection)
    Creates a new ArrayValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    ArrayValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, A actual, Collection<E> actualAsCollection, List<ValidationFailure> failures)  
    BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, BigDecimal actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures)  
    BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, BigDecimal actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures)  
    BigDecimalValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, BigDecimal actual)  
    BooleanValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Boolean actual)  
    ClassValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Class<T> actual)  
    CollectionValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, C actual, Pluralizer pluralizer)
    Creates a CollectionValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    CollectionValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, C actual, Pluralizer pluralizer, List<ValidationFailure> failures)
    Creates a CollectionValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.
    ComparableValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, T actual)  
    DoubleValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Double actual)  
    FloatValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Float actual)  
    InetAddressValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, InetAddress actual)
    Creates a InetAddressValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    IntegerValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Integer actual)  
    ListValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, L actual, Pluralizer pluralizer)
    Creates a ListValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    ListValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, L actual, Pluralizer pluralizer, List<ValidationFailure> failures)
    Creates a ListValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.
    LongValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Long actual)  
    MapValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Map<K,​V> actual)  
    NumberValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, T actual)  
    ObjectValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, T actual)  
    OptionalValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Optional<?> actual)  
    PathValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Path actual)
    Creates a new PathValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    PathValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Path actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures)
    Creates a new PathValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.
    PrimitiveBooleanValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, boolean actual)  
    PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, char actual)  
    PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Double actual)  
    PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Float actual)  
    PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, T actual)  
    PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, T actual)  
    SizeValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String collectionName, Object collection, String sizeName, int size, Pluralizer pluralizer, List<ValidationFailure> failures)  
    StringValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, String actual)
    Creates a StringValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    StringValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, String actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures)
    Creates a StringValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.
    UriValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, URI actual)
    Creates a UriValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    UrlValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, URL actual)
    Creates a UrlValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
